title: aidia parvifolia
intro: Aidia parvifolia, also known as the small-leaved aidia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aidia parvifolia include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic, with herbal preparations typically involving the leaves and stems being used in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
